text.title: Strategy Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Business need is a one-line slogan ('Become the leader').
antipattern.fix: Require ≥80 chars including measurable outcome + constraint.

antipattern.symptom: Current and future state are described in symmetric prose without measurable delta.
antipattern.fix: Require numeric delta per gap axis; reject prose-only gaps.

antipattern.symptom: Gaps are listed without a closure plan or owner.
antipattern.fix: Require closure_plan per gap with named milestone date.
